Divisioona (page does not exist)") * [Finland men's national ice hockey team](/wiki/Finland_men%27s_national_ice_hockey_team "Finland men's national ice hockey team") * [SM-sarja](/wiki/SM-sarja "SM-sarja") *(defunct)* * [Auroraliiga](/wiki/Auroraliiga "Auroraliiga") * [Naisten Mestis](/wiki/Naisten_Mestis "Naisten Mestis") * [Finland women's national ice hockey team](/wiki/Finland_women%27s_national_ice_hockey_team "Finland women's national ice hockey team") * [U20 SM-sarja](/wiki/U20_SM-sarja "U20 SM-sarja") * [Finland men's national junior ice hockey team](/wiki/Finland_men%27s_national_junior_ice_hockey_team "Finland men's national junior ice hockey team")
was the 21st season of the SM-liiga, the top level of ice hockey in [Finland](/wiki/Finland "Finland"). 12 teams participated in the league, and Jokerit Helsinki won the championship.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Finnish ice hockey season

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/b/bd/SM-liiga_logo_1995%E2%80%932005.png/120px-SM-liiga_logo_1995%E2%80%932005.png)](/wiki/File:SM-liiga_logo_1995%E2%80%932005.png)

SM-liiga introduced this logo for the 1995–96 season. It was used until 2005.

The **1995–96 [SM-liiga](/wiki/SM-liiga "SM-liiga") season** was the 21st season of the SM-liiga, the top level of ice hockey in [Finland](/wiki/Finland "Finland"). 12 teams participated in the league, and Jokerit Helsinki won the championship.

## Standings

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1995%E2%80%9396_SM-liiga_season&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Standings")]

|  | Team | GP | W | T | L | GF | GA | Diff | Pts |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | [Jokerit](/wiki/Jokerit "Jokerit") | 50 | 31 | 11 | 8 | 190 | 91 | +99 | **73** |
| 2 | [TPS](/wiki/TPS_(ice_hockey) "TPS (ice hockey)") | 50 | 33 | 5 | 12 | 216 | 141 | +75 | **71** |
| 3 | [Lukko](/wiki/Lukko "Lukko") | 50 | 25 | 9 | 16 | 205 | 177 | +28 | **59** |
| 4 | [Tappara](/wiki/Tappara "Tappara") | 50 | 24 | 7 | 19 | 172 | 161 | +11 | **55** |
| 5 | [HPK](/wiki/HPK "HPK") | 50 | 23 | 7 | 20 | 160 | 151 | +9 | **53** |
| 6 | [HIFK](/wiki/HIFK "HIFK") | 50 | 21 | 10 | 19 | 142 | 158 | -16 | **52** |
| 7 | [Ässät](/wiki/Porin_%C3%84ss%C3%A4t_(men%27s_ice_hockey) "Porin Ässät (men's ice hockey)") | 50 | 22 | 5 | 23 | 140 | 160 | -20 | **49** |
| 8 | [Ilves](/wiki/Ilves "Ilves") | 50 | 18 | 7 | 25 | 153 | 183 | -30 | **43** |
| 9 | [Kiekko-Espoo](/wiki/Espoo_Blues "Espoo Blues") | 50 | 18 | 6 | 26 | 131 | 164 | -33 | **42** |
| 10 | [JYP](/wiki/JYP_Jyv%C3%A4skyl%C3%A4 "JYP Jyväskylä") | 50 | 13 | 11 | 26 | 132 | 155 | -23 | **37** |
| 11 | [KalPa](/wiki/KalPa "KalPa") | 50 | 13 | 10 | 27 | 126 | 162 | -36 | **36** |
| 12 | [TuTo](/wiki/TuTo "TuTo") | 50 | 12 | 6 | 32 | 140 | 204 | -64 | **30** |

## Playoffs

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1995%E2%80%9396_SM-liiga_season&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Playoffs")]

### Quarterfinals

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1995%E2%80%9396_SM-liiga_season&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Quarterfinals")]

* **[Jokerit](/wiki/Jokerit "Jokerit")** - [Ilves](/wiki/Ilves "Ilves") 3:0 (11:2, 7:2, 3:1)
* **[TPS](/wiki/TPS_(ice_hockey) "TPS (ice hockey)")** - [Ässät](/wiki/Porin_%C3%84ss%C3%A4t_(men%27s_ice_hockey) "Porin Ässät (men's ice hockey)") 3:0 (4:0, 4:2, 6:3)
* **[Lukko](/wiki/Lukko "Lukko")** - [HIFK](/wiki/HIFK "HIFK") 3:0 (2:1, 6:4, 4:1)
* [Tappara](/wiki/Tappara "Tappara") - **[HPK](/wiki/HPK "HPK")** 1:3 (1:3, 3:5, 7:2, 1:7)

### Semifinals

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1995%E2%80%9396_SM-liiga_season&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Semifinals")]

* **[Jokerit](/wiki/Jokerit "Jokerit")** - [HPK](/wiki/HPK "HPK") 3:1 (2:3, 3:0, 4:1, 6:0)
* **[TPS](/wiki/TPS_(ice_hockey) "TPS (ice hockey)")** - [Lukko](/wiki/Lukko "Lukko") 3:1 (2:3, 3:1, 4:2, 4:2)

### 3rd place

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1995%E2%80%9396_SM-liiga_season&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: 3rd place")]

* **[Lukko](/wiki/Lukko "Lukko")** - [HPK](/wiki/HPK "HPK") 2:1

### Final

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1995%E2%80%9396_SM-liiga_season&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Final")]

* **[Jokerit](/wiki/Jokerit "Jokerit")** - [TPS](/wiki/TPS_(ice_hockey) "TPS (ice hockey)") 3:1 (0:1, 6:1, 5:1, 4:1)
